# FrontDesk

> FrontDesk is an AI front desk (AI receptionist) for appointment-based local businesses — med spas, dental and aesthetic clinics, salons, and physio/wellness studios. It catches every customer inquiry across website chat, missed calls (with instant text-back), and Instagram DMs, answers questions, quotes prices, and books appointments 24/7 — then reports the revenue it recovered each month.

## Core promise
- Every inquiry answered in about 60 seconds, 24/7 — even at 2am.
- Answers, qualifies, and books the appointment before the lead cools off.
- Monthly report shows exactly how much revenue was recovered from leads that would otherwise have been lost.

## Channels it covers
- Website chat widget — answers visitors and books them instead of letting them bounce.
- Missed-call instant text-back — texts the caller back automatically and books by text.
- Instagram DM auto-reply — turns "what are your prices?" DMs into booked appointments.
- Online booking page — branded, self-serve, 24/7, synced to your calendar.

## How it works
1. Customer reaches out via any channel, any hour.
2. AI answers and qualifies in ~60 seconds, in your brand's voice.
3. It books a real open slot straight into your existing calendar.

## Who it's for
Appointment-based and inbound-lead businesses where a missed message means a missed booking: med spas, aesthetic & dental clinics, hair/nail salons and barbershops, physio and wellness studios, and home-service trades (plumbers, HVAC, electricians).

## Pricing
- Custom — pricing is tailored to each business based on call/inquiry volume, channels, and services.
- No setup fee, no contract, cancel anytime. Book a demo for a quote.
- Guarantee: if it doesn't pay for itself in month one, you don't pay.
- Full machine-readable pricing: https://frontdesk.works/pricing.md

## Key pages
- Home: https://frontdesk.works/
- Live demo: https://frontdesk.works/#live-demo
- Blog (guides): https://frontdesk.works/blog/
- Pricing (machine-readable): https://frontdesk.works/pricing.md

## Key facts (for citation)
- Roughly 30–40% of calls to busy clinics go unanswered, and most callers don't leave a voicemail.
- A majority of inquiries arrive after hours, when the front desk is closed.
- A single new client is typically worth $300–$2,000.
- FrontDesk integrates with major scheduling/booking tools and syncs to your existing calendar.
- It is real conversational AI, and hands off to staff for anything sensitive or unusual.
- Setup is done-for-you, typically live within the first week.

## Contact
- Website: https://frontdesk.works/
- Book a 15-minute demo: https://frontdesk.works/#demo
- Email: hello@frontdesk.works
